name: design-expansion-team
description: Shared team package for the Figma Design Expansion skill, including PRD mapping, token-preserving Figma expansion, canvas orchestration, and high-fidelity HTML validation.

interface.shortDescription: 统一安装和更新 Figma 设计方案拓展 Skill。
interface.longDescription: 仅包含 figma-design-expansion：从现有设计稿与 PRD 理解、内部字段映射、组件与 Token 保留，到画布编排、Figma 读回校验及 HTML 高还原度约束。
interface.defaultPrompt: 读取现有设计稿和需求，先完成可检查的理解与映射，再复用原组件和 Token 拓展设计状态并读回校验。
